summary: Tightened qd completion report evidence[] validation so entries must be HTTP(S) URLs or existing repo-relative paths, with absolute, traversal, and missing paths rejected.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/completion.sh accepts completion evidence[] entries that are existing repo-relative paths or HTTP(S) URLs.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: validate_completion_evidence_paths now allows http:// and https:// entries and validates non-URL entries as repo-relative paths that exist; evidence/m4-qd-report-evidence-path-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records the current report set passing.
evidence/m4-qd-report-evidence-path-contract/negative-smoke-absolute-evidence-path.log records a temporary copied completion report failing with the expected repo-relative evidence path error.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/completion.sh rejects evidence[] paths containing .. traversal.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-evidence-path-contract/negative-smoke-traversal-evidence-path.log records a temporary copied completion report failing with the expected traversal error.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: scripts/qd-report-check/completion.sh rejects missing repo-relative evidence[] paths.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-evidence-path-contract/negative-smoke-missing-evidence-path.log records a temporary copied completion report failing with the expected missing path error.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Existing qd completion reports pass without weakening the contract.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-evidence-path-contract/just-qd-reports-check.log records just qd-reports-check passing with existing completion reports and the stricter evidence[] contract.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and temporary-copy negative smokes for absolute, traversal, and missing evidence paths.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: The evidence directory contains logs for just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, git diff --check, and the three temporary-copy negative smokes.

acceptanceEvidence.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceEvidence.evidence: realWorldValidation marks macOS-specific validation as not required; only Linux command evidence is claimed.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd metadata validation only; Linux command evidence is recorded and no macOS-specific validation is required or claimed.
